title: oxalis noctiflora
intro: Oxalis noctiflora, also known as the Night-Blooming Wood Sorrel, is a perennial plant species in the Oxalidaceae family. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Oxalis noctiflora can be prepared for herbal use in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
